body: [{"ac":1,"text":"Service struct gains a harnessByName(name string) harnesses.Harness method consulting the registered-harnesses field","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"service_refresh_scheduler.go owns a debounced ticker per registered QuotaHarness firing at QuotaFreshness()/2 and per AccountHarness whose AccountFreshness() differs from quota","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"Scheduler discovers harnesses by iterating service.harnessByName over the registry and type-asserting to QuotaHarness / AccountHarness independently","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"Scheduler reads QuotaStatus before each potential refresh to obtain CapturedAt; on cache-cold (State=QuotaUnavailable) the scheduler always calls RefreshQuota","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"Scheduler skips a tick when last-known QuotaStatus.CapturedAt is within QuotaFreshness() of now (cache-freshness dedup is the scheduler's job, not RefreshQuota's)","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":6,"text":"Startup refresh kickoff fires once on scheduler construction for every registered QuotaHarness / AccountHarness with a cache-cold state, per the cache-cold path in primary-harness-capability-baseline.md","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":7,"text":"Fake-clock tests prove debounce cadence, single-flight respect via cache lock, startup kickoff, and clean ctx cancel","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":8,"text":"Per-harness Refresh*Async helpers remain in place for now (deleted in each harness's e-step)","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
